info.name: Planning Analytics
info.description:
This collection requires Planning Analtyics Workspace 2.1.21/3.1.8 or later releases for OAuth authentication and access to the PAW REST API.

Set the clientID, clientSecret, PA-URL, and TM1-URL variables to use the collection

PA-URL is the URL for Planning Analytics Workspace  
TM1-URL is /api/v1/tm1//api/v1

PAW REST API guide: [https://www.ibm.com/docs/en/planning-analytics/2.1.0?topic=workspace-planning-analytics-rest-api](https://www.ibm.com/docs/en/planning-analytics/2.1.0?topic=workspace-planning-analytics-rest-api)

TM1 REST API guide: [https://www.ibm.com/docs/en/planning-analytics/2.1.0?topic=analytics-tm1-rest-api](https://www.ibm.com/docs/en/planning-analytics/2.1.0?topic=analytics-tm1-rest-api)

item.name: Get all members with parents in hierarchy

item.name: Content (new in 2.1.21 & 3.1.8)
Get asset content by asset ID
Get asset effective permissions by asset ID
Get asset permissions by asset ID

item.name: Database management

variable.description: OAuth client ID is generated in the Integrations tile in PAA
OAuth client secret is generated in the Integrations tile in PAA
Base URL for the Planning Analtyics environment.  For example, https://us-east-1.planninganalytics.saas.ibm.com
